---
title: "Henrietta Murray"
---

## Henrietta Murray

**Dates:** (b. Colchester 1838/9)

### Description

editor of the short-lived <i>Events of the Month</i>

### Biography

She was daughter of the Rev. William Murray (b. 1806/7), curate of Salcombe, and Frances St. Aubyn Hunter-Arundell [1871 census at the address given in letter to Macmillan 1865; 1861 census]

### Letters

- Letter from Febry 10th 1865
- Letter from Feb 8 1865
- Letter from Jan 17 1865
- Letter from Oct 29th [1863]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
